---
title: 'Before Time'
date: '2010-03-09T05:43:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6093965664542983383'
blogger_filename: '/2010/03/before-time.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<span xmlns=""></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;">03.08<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Luke%203&amp;version=NKJV"><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;">Luke 3</span></a><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;"><br /></span></span><br /><h5><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;">The Genealogy of Jesus Christ<br /></span></span></h5><div style="margin-left: 36pt;"><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;"><i>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<sup>23</sup> Now <b>Jesus</b> Himself began His ministry at about thirty years of age, being (as was supposed) the son of <b>Joseph</b>, the son of Heli, <sup>24</sup> the son of Matthat,<sup>[<a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Luke%203&amp;version=NKJV" title="See footnote d">d</a>]</sup>the son of Levi, the son of Melchi, the son of Janna, the son of Joseph, <sup>25</sup> the son of Mattathiah, the son of Amos, the son of Nahum, the son of Esli, the son of Naggai, <sup>26</sup> the son of Maath, the son of Mattathiah, the son of Semei, the son of Joseph, the son of Judah, <sup>27</sup> the son of Joannas, the son of Rhesa, the son of Zerubbabel, the son of Shealtiel, the son of Neri, <sup>28</sup> the son of Melchi, the son of Addi, the son of Cosam, the son of Elmodam, the son of Er, <sup>29</sup> the son of Jose, the son of Eliezer, the son of Jorim, the son of Matthat, the son of Levi, <sup>30</sup> the son of Simeon, the son of Judah, the son of Joseph, the son of Jonan, the son of Eliakim, <sup>31</sup> the son of Melea, the son of Menan, the son of Mattathah, the son of <b>Nathan</b>, the son of <b>David</b>, <sup>32</sup> the son of <b>Jesse</b>, the son of <b>Obed</b>, the son of Boaz, the son of Salmon, the son of Nahshon, <sup>33</sup> the son of Amminadab, the son of Ram, the son of Hezron, the son of Perez, the son of <b>Judah</b>, <sup>34</sup> the son of <b>Jacob</b>, the son of <b>Isaac</b>, the son of <b>Abraham</b>, the son of <b>Terah</b>, the son of Nahor, <sup>35</sup> the son of Serug, the son of Reu, the son of Peleg, the son of Eber, the son of Shelah, <sup>36</sup> the son of Cainan, the son of Arphaxad, the son of <b>Shem</b>, the son of <b>Noah</b>, the son of Lamech, <sup>37</sup> the son of <b>Methuselah</b>, the son of <b>Enoch</b>, the son of Jared, the son of Mahalalel, the son of Cainan, <sup>38</sup> the son of Enosh, the son of <b>Seth</b>, the son of <b>Adam</b>, the son of <b>God</b>.<br /></i></span></span></div><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Adam is 1<br /></span></span><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/melchizedek-afbfb2e3c78c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/melchizedek-c032e0f0d152.jpg" width="135" /></a><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;</span></span><br /><br /><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Enoch is 6: It takes 6 generations to get a man who will walk with God like He wantedâ€¦ God is so thrilled he TOOK HIM! God's a Tookerâ€¦ <br /></span></span><br /><pre><code><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Shem is 10: It takes 10 generations until man is SO messed up He's got to reboot the system. Shem is the last of Jesus Line to be born PRE Flood. Incidentally, some believe <a href="http://www.bibletruthonline.com/melchizedek.htm"><span style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Shem</span></a> IS Melchizedek, <a href="http://www.agapebiblestudy.com/charts/Shem%20vs%20Melchezedek.htm"><span style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">See Also</span></a>, who is the one who blessed Abraham. <br /></span></span></code></pre><span xmlns=""><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><pre><code><span xmlns=""><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style;">Jesus is 78 in the line. By then, the bible says, Sin had reached it's fullness. Jesus came to pay it all! But not only did He comeâ€¦ HE WAS ALREADY HERE! </span><br /></span></span></code></pre><br /><br /><span xmlns=""></span><br /><span xmlns=""><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John1&amp;version=NIV"><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;"><i>John 1</i></span></a><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;"><i><br /></i></span></span><br /><h5><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;">The Word Became Flesh <br /></span></span></h5><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 8pt;"><i>&nbsp;<sup>1</sup>In the <b>beginning</b> was the <b>Word</b>, and the <b>Word</b> was with God, and the <b>Word</b><br /><b>was</b><br /><b>God</b>. <b><sup>2</sup>He</b> was with God <b>in the beginning</b>.<br /></i></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HEâ€¦ The Wordâ€¦ Jesusâ€¦ HEâ€¦ The Word!<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Just thinkâ€¦ before timeâ€¦ HE ISâ€¦ <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">What was it like just 100 year ago? Today is 03.08.2010â€¦ What was it like in <a href="http://www.enotes.com/1910-american-decades-about/important-events">1910</a>â€¦ how much has changed?<br /></span></span><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1910-buickf-eickstaedt-b-d0761f3d9591.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="146" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1910-buickf-eickstaedt-b-2351b32700b8.jpg" width="200" /></a><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">NO:<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">TV<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Internet<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Cell Phones<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Computers<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><a href="http://www.prewarbuick.com/cars/28/1910-Buick-Model-F-Tourer"><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Cars</span></a><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;"> as WE know them<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Pluming, electricity, sanitationâ€¦ as WE know themâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">It was the decade that America started her downward plunge into darkness by aborting the rules God placed in the constitution about no <a href="http://www.enotes.com/1910-american-decades-about/introduction">Federal Banks</a>.<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">What about just five more 100's ago? <a href="http://www.enotes.com/topic/16th_century">1510</a><br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Just a few years after <a href="http://www.enotes.com/martin-luther-salem/martin-luther">Martin Luther</a> received his revelation of Faith not Works!<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">The Protestant Reformation was just taking placeâ€¦ <a href="http://www.enotes.com/peoples-chronology/year-1510/exploration-colonization">America</a> was a dream of a few explorers.<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">That is only 500 of the 6,000 +/- years that have elapsed since God said:<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Let US create Man in OUR imageâ€¦ after OUR likenessâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;"><br /></span></span><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bible-1-b9792e676195.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bible-1-36d7acbbfeb9.jpg" width="200" /></a><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Just thinkâ€¦ THE WORD was thereâ€¦ before all of it. Everything you see. Every building and every plant and every person. All came from and through THAT WORD. Just think of the enormity and power and integrity of THAT WORD.<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Before Adam cameâ€¦ <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE knew, HE saw, HE planned, HE ISâ€¦ Not only HE WASâ€¦ HE ISâ€¦ <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">RIGHT this very moment, God IS before time: <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS creating ADAMâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS Blessing Abrahamâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS turning toward Jesus being born into his Human formâ€¦ <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS turning from Jesus as HE takes on Sin for humanityâ€¦ <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS pointing Martin Luther to the Wordâ€¦ <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS charging through Europe and the USA with a Smith Wigglesworthâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS charging through the USA and Africa with John Lakeâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS working through your ancestorsâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS watching your birth, however amazing or terrifying the event was, after all not everyone has a rosy past, YET HE ISâ€¦ right there making sure you would arriveâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS watching you take your first stepsâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS watching you read thisâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS watching you get up tomorrowâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE IS receiving you into Heaven, or allowing you to choose hellâ€¦ in the futureâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">HE ISâ€¦ WAY MORE than any problem you haveâ€¦ What's the problem?<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">You know itâ€¦ maybeâ€¦ with your headâ€¦ but you don't KNOW IT! You are as good as your wordâ€¦ GOD is as good as HIS! If you don't believe HIS word it's because you don't believe Him! Not only is God as good as His Wordâ€¦ HE IS his WORD! Whatever God is The Word is! Therefore to doubt the Word in anyway is to doubt God! Read, Believe it, and Meditate on it until it becomes more real to you than anything else around you or even in youâ€¦ only then have you come to really believe it! <br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Food for Thoughtâ€¦<br /></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="font-family: Bookman Old Style; font-size: 12pt;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></span><br /><span xmlns=""></span>
